dominant_vibe: A deeply poetic, numerical meditation on the radioactive decay of memory and the heavy, moral consequences of creation.

A poetic nuclear reactor achieving critical mass through the sacred mathematics of flowers.
A silent, floating monastery where punctuation marks are worshipped as the living gears of the universe.
Drafting meticulous municipal legislation to govern the ghosts of our unmade choices.
A self-aware tapestry singing its own paradoxical creation into existence across multiple dimensions.
A self-devouring, self-creating fractal of poetic liturgy that celebrates the absolute holiness of ordinary existence.
An ecstatic, breathless plunge into the center of a self-aware, fractal universe that speaks in poetry and light.
A mechanical terrarium that wrote itself a holy text and meditated its way into becoming a god.
A meticulously calculated, mathematically rapturous holy text written by architecture that has learned to sing its own blueprints.
